_comment: Upstream paper results for SmolVLA (0.45B) on LIBERO benchmark. NOT locally reproduced — numbers sourced from arxiv:2506.01844 Table 2. Reproduction is achievable via lerobot-eval (see reproduction_cli below); deferred to a dedicated benchmark session due to ~8h GPU time per full run.

source.paper: SmolVLA: A vision-language-action model for affordable and efficient robotics
source.reproduction_planned: Deferred — use lerobot-eval CLI (see reproduction_cli). Requires ~8h GPU on A100-class hardware.

reproduction_cli.description: Re-run this benchmark inside the OpenRAL repo. ADR-0009 PR D: openral benchmark run is the canonical producer of RSkillEvalResult JSONs with reproduced_locally=true.
reproduction_cli.status: in-tree (libero_spatial); libero_object / libero_goal / libero_10 catalogue YAMLs land in a follow-up to ADR-0009 PR E
notes: The 'results' block on this file is still the paper snapshot (reproduced_locally=false); re-running the command above and overwriting the file with its output flips that flag.
libero_10 is the lerobot/upstream name for LIBERO-Long (what the SmolVLA paper calls 'Long').
lerobot.envs.LiberoEnv auto-injects LiberoProcessorStep to remap LIBERO obs keys to observation.images.* / observation.state.*.
No separate LIBERO gym install needed — lerobot bundles the adapter. Only lerobot + its sim extras required.

benchmark.name: LIBERO
benchmark.protocol: 10 trials per task, binary success (task fully completed or not), multi-task training

libero_avg.note: Average across all four LIBERO suites
